# Endor Labs Agent Kit

> Source repository for Endor Labs workflow agents, generated host artifacts,
> plugin packages, guardrails, tests, provenance, and source documentation.

## Start Here

- `README.md`: generated catalog front door for humans and agents.
- `docs/getting-started.md`: human install and first-run guide.
- `docs/for-agents.md`: agent operating rules for installing, editing, validating, and syncing.
- `docs/contributing-agents.md`: contribution, approval, provenance, signing, and generated `ai-plugins` PR process.
- `docs/maintainer-guide.md`: source recipe, generated docs, and publication template workflow.
- `docs/distribution-sync.md`: source-to-`ai-plugins` mirror process.
- `docs/plugin-release-checklist.md`: release validation matrix.
- `docs/guardrails.md`: safety and runtime-control documentation.
- `docs/portable-runtime-conformance.md`: portable adapter and approval-gate contract.

## Source Of Truth

- `source/agents/<agent>/recipe.yaml`: public agent identity, host compatibility, capabilities, and safety class.
- `source/agents/<agent>/instructions.md`: source prompt body.
- `source/agents/<agent>/actions.yaml`: semantic side-effect contract when present.
- `source/agents/<agent>/evals/cases.yaml`: behavior/eval cases.
- `source/agents/<agent>/architecture.svg`: architecture diagram copied into generated artifacts.
- `src/endor_agent_kit/publication/`: generated README and package publication templates.

## Generated Outputs

- `README.md`
- `manifest.json`
- `claude-code/`
- `claude-managed-agents/`
- `codex/`
- `gemini/`
- `portable/`
- `plugins/`
- `.cursor-plugin/`
- `agents/<generated-cursor-agent>.md`
- `skills/<generated-cursor-skill>/`
- `cursor-sdk/`
- `assets/logo.svg`
- `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- `.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`

Generated outputs are checked in for installation, but behavior changes should
start from source recipes or publication code and then regenerate.

## Common Commands

```bash
endor-agent-kit publish source/agents/*/recipe.yaml --dest . --prune --include-plugins
python -m pytest -q
endor-agent-kit check-guardrails --catalog-root .
endor-agent-kit verify-provenance --catalog-root .
git diff --check
```

Use `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m endor_agent_kit.cli ...` when the console script
is not installed.

## Public Mirror

The public distribution mirror is
[🐙 Endor Labs AI Plugins](https://github.com/endorlabs/ai-plugins/tree/main).
Sync it only after Agent Kit generation and validation are clean. Normal sync
keeps `ai-plugins/plugins/` byte-for-byte identical to this repo's `plugins/`
and copies Cursor package files from `.cursor-plugin/`, generated root workflow
`agents/`, generated root workflow `skills/`, `cursor-sdk/`, and
`assets/logo.svg`. Gemini root compatibility files are separate from Cursor.
Maintainer-approved merges to Agent Kit `main` should publish generated mirror
PRs through `.github/workflows/publish-ai-plugins-pr.yml`.
